description: Boletín Oficial de la República Argentina — search published normas, fetch by ID, query the day's edition, subscribe to keyword/CUIT/organismo updates.

tools.name: bo_search
tools.description: Full-text search the Boletín Oficial archive. Filter by organismo, fecha range, keyword. Returns ranked normas with summary + publication date.

tools.name: bo_get_norma
tools.description: Fetch a single norma by its BO id. Returns the full body + metadata (issuing organism, date, sumario).

tools.name: bo_today
tools.description: Fetch all normas published in today's Boletín Oficial. Useful for the morning operating loop on a sociedad-IA.

tools.name: bo_subscribe
tools.description: Subscribe to BO updates by CUIT, organismo, or keyword. Notifications are dispatched via the configured webhook.

tools.name: bo_list_subscriptions
tools.description: List all active BO subscriptions for the current tenant.

tools.name: bo_unsubscribe
tools.description: Cancel a BO subscription by id. Used by the agent to retire stale watch criteria.
